description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a clean, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows distributed along the longer facades, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes a main entryway with a glass door and a small overhang, as well as a secondary section that appears to be a garage or utility room. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions for different rooms and spaces, including a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large asymmetrical windows. The design is minimalist, with an open layout and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side elevation highlighting the long facade, multiple windows, and the secondary section extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, additional windows, and the compact extension on one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side elevation with a clear view of the secondary section and the arrangement of windows along the wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
